flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 31% at Truman State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.7k vs 3.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Truman State University fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3k → 2.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Truman State University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.4k → $18.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Truman State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
